name: Battlin' Boxer Counterpunch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> カウンターブロー
desc: During the Damage Step of either player's turn, when a "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control is attacking or being attacked: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard; that monster gains 1000 ATK, until the end of this turn. You can only use the effect of "Battlin' Boxer Counterpunch" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the Damage Step of either player's turn, when a "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control is attacking or being attacked: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard; that monster gains 1000 ATK, until the end of this turn. You can only use the effect of "Battlin' Boxer Counterpunch" once per turn.
eff: During the Damage Step of either player's turn, when a "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control is attacking or being attacked: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard; that monster gains 1000 ATK, until the end of this turn. You can only use the effect of "Battlin' Boxer Counterpunch" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
